properties.name: Austin Vintage Guitars
properties.description: Austin's largest dedicated vintage and used guitar shop; heavy focus on Fender/Gibson classics, amps, and repair bench.

properties.name: South Austin Music
properties.description: Neighbourhood guitar institution since the 1980s offering new and used electrics/acoustics, quirky mid-price gear, repairs and lessons.

properties.name: Moon Music Pro
properties.address: 2210 W Anderson Ln Ste B, Austin, TX 78757
properties.description: Independent shop with rotating stock of new, used and vintage guitars and ukes; strong reputation for friendly service, setups and repairs.

properties.name: Austin Guitar House
properties.description: Boutique-oriented store focused on high-end, often hand-built electrics and amps; carries used and consignment pieces alongside new boutique lines.

properties.name: Strait Music Company (Bee Caves Rd)
properties.address: 3201 Bee Caves Rd Ste 140, Austin, TX 78746
properties.description: Full-line family-owned music store with strong acoustic and electric guitar departments and a mix of new and used inventory plus large repair shop.

properties.name: Strait Music Company (North Austin)
properties.description: North Austin branch of Strait Music with broad new and pre-owned guitar selection, rentals and service.

properties.name: Fiddler's Green Music Shop
properties.description: Small acoustic-oriented shop specialising in higher-end used and new flattops, mandolins and banjos; serious destination for acoustic folk/bluegrass players.

properties.name: Guitar Center Austin (Anderson Ln)
properties.description: Big-box chain with large used section; good for mainstream brands and frequent turnover of pre-owned gear.

properties.name: Guitar Center South Austin (MoPac)
properties.address: 5300 S Mopac Expy Ste 103, Austin, TX 78749
properties.description: South Austin Guitar Center location with standard mix of new and used guitars and amps.
